---
title: "Research"
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../assets/templates/research/listing.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: posters
    contents: "posters/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../assets/templates/research/listing.ejs
    categories: true
page-layout: full
toc-location: right
---

My research focuses on the environmental and social determinants of cancer, using causal inference and evidence triangulation to strengthen causal conclusions from observational data.

## Journal articles

:::{#articles}
:::

## Conference posters

:::{#posters}
:::

## Working papers

- **Clonal evolution and genomic divergence in penile squamous cell carcinoma: insights from matched premalignant, normal, and tumor tissues.**
- **Cohort Profile Update: The Human Early Life Exposome (HELIX) Cohort.**

## Research software

**[etverse](https://github.com/etverse)** — modular R ecosystem for transparent causal inference. In development.

- [`causatr`](https://github.com/etverse/causatr): causal effects estimation.
- [`negatr`](https://github.com/etverse/negatr): negative control analysis — detecting and correcting unmeasured confounding.
- [`matchatr`](https://github.com/etverse/matchatr): analysis of (matched) case-control and case-cohort studies.
- [`survatr`](https://github.com/etverse/survatr): analysis of survival (time-to-event) data.

**Standalone packages**

- [`forrest`](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/forrest): publication-ready forest plots (epidemiology, meta-analysis). On [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=forrest).
- [`orcidtr`](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/orcidtr): retrieve data from the ORCID public API. On [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=orcidtr).

---

*For the most up-to-date list of publications, please see my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=QbPv1H0AAAAJ&hl=en).*
